visual: Horse stance with both hands tracing mirrored spiraling circles in front of the torso, driven by continuous waist rotation.
motion_description: The practitioner maintains a wide, stable horse stance with gentle side-to-side weight shifts. Both arms perform continuous, mirrored circular motions, sweeping inward and down towards the waist, rising along the centerline to head height, and spiraling outward and downward to the sides. This fluid, steady movement is closely coordinated with continuous, subtle turning of the torso.
